'''Elibet Dav''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabrak]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Iridonia/Legends|Iridonia]] who was the sister of [[Kaysil Verwood]]. She joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] with her sister during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Sources==
